data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement that all resources must be available at the same time.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that all necessary components (venue, catering, AV, and staff) are included in a single booking. However, the evidence only confirms that a booking was made for an offer that includes a venue and catering, but does not explicitly confirm the inclusion of AV and staff. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the completeness of the booking requirement.
gaps: AV and staff are not confirmed as part of the booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
